_patch_meta.description: Insert new prose_section_type row for Chapter 5 section G12 — Documentation-implementation alignment. New handle at sort_order 109, chapter_no 5, source_stage 'programme'. Confirmation: SELECT id, code, label, chapter_no, sort_order FROM prose_section_type WHERE code = 'prog_doc_impl_alignment' — returns one row with chapter_no=5, sort_order=109.

record.label: Programme — Documentation–implementation alignment
record.description: The standing governance principle that the programme's rules, slot descriptions, schema, and documentation are not assumed to be fully synchronised at any point. Where a rule names a field or a concept the implementation or the documentation does not match, the mismatch is named as a governance item and resolved through migration, patch, or documentation revision — not tolerated silently.
